## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run type-check`, `npm test`, and `npm run build` pass locally
- [ ] New/changed components follow the [conventions](../CONTRIBUTING.md#component-conventions) (tokens, a11y, forwardRef, CSS Modules)
- [ ] Tests cover the new behavior
- [ ] README prop table and showcase site demo updated (for component changes)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]`
